ab: maha nanu ku kayan sawni?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: mahatu witux la,makilux balay kayan la.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.

ab: masakinut ti tanux aw?
en: A: Is it going to be cold outside?

ab: sakinut ki, kapayux malukus su latan yu.
en: B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: makilux ti tanux aw?
en: A: Will it be hot outside?

ab: ini yu, masabayhuy la, tala’atu balay ki.
en: B: No, it's windy and cool.

ab: pakasa nanu ku kayan sawni?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: ayat pasakinut ru ayat pakilux uziy, balayi balay.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: pakusa nanu ku kayan malahangan sawni?
en: A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: ungat yulung babaw kayan, mahatu ku yangah la.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.

ab: maha nanu ku kayan ti tanux?
en: A: How is the weather outside?

ab: nisan masiwat ku walax, niyan witux ru mahatu hawngu liyutux uziy la.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: maha nanu ku kayan su kiya hiya?
en: A: How is the weather there?

ab: rahu ku bayhuy miyan runi hiya.
en: B: We're going to have a big storm here.

ab: Balayi ku kayan su kiya hiya?
en: A: How's the weather there?

ab: hu’ yu, mahatu su rahu waitux.ay.
en: B: Very well, out of the big sun.

ab: musa kung miru la.
en: A: I have to go to school.

ab: masakinut ku kayan, kapayux hazi’ malukus latan.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: musa kung tanux la.
en: A: I'm going out.

ab: na tikay han pawalax kisa la, laxiy yangay maras su tabakuy ki.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.

ab: musa mawalax pi?
en: A: Is it going to rain?

ab: nisan sababu bisu ki, musa mawalax kisa yu!!
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.

ab: mawalax la?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: minwalax sawni, hani laga masiwat walax la.
ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.

ab: mawalax la ?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: asi ga minwalax la yu,mahuzi ku tu’iy ki.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: niya mawaax pi? huwaka ka mahuzi kwara’ ku hi su?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: ki mawalax tanux, ini kuzing aras su tabakuy.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.

ab: lawkah su na ga?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: tiya kinrahu ku bayhuy, maymaw maxayan tunux mu ka sinbahuyan niya.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.

ab: lawkah su na ga?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: tiya kinrahu ku witux, maymaw matyabus tunux ka sinbuwan niya.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
